normalization_contract.authority: candidate design only; independent review required before adoption and coverage
normalization_contract.canonical_disposition: one occurrence disposition is inherited; conflicting occurrence dispositions produce a non-adopting fail-closed aggregate without changing occurrence terminal counts
normalization_contract.generic_contract: generic lexeme presence is insufficient; concrete AST/dataflow/command/config/test-oracle signals are required
normalization_contract.insufficient_evidence: typed terminal non-adopt; reopening requires a new extractor/evidence digest
normalization_contract.same_span: each edge is independently classified as duplicate same-behavior occurrence, true over-split fragment, or distinct co-located behavior
normalization_contract.under_split: parser children carry clause digests and typed contracts; the aggregate parent is superseded only inside this candidate design projection
